bio: Ali Nikzad is a conservative civil engineer and politician from Ardabil Province who has served as Second Deputy Speaker of the [Majlis](/orgs/islamic-consultative-assembly) under Ghalibaf across two consecutive sessions (2020–present). He previously served as Minister of Roads and Urban Development under [Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad) (2011–2013) and has been a member of the [Expediency Discernment Council](/orgs/expediency-discernment-council).
editorial_notes: Born 1961. Minister of Roads and Urban Development 2011–2013. Member Expediency Discernment Council.
